haikus.text:
their thundering tune
after wave rolls out of sight
onto shore below
lines: after wave rolls out of sight

prompt_info.system_prompt: You write haiku poems. A haiku has exactly 3 lines: line 1 has 5 syllables, line 2 has 7 syllables, line 3 has 5 syllables. Write ONLY the 3 lines. No title, no explanation.
prompt_info.user_prompt:
Write a nature haiku about cicadas and about ocean waves.

Example 1 (5-7-5):
Wind moves through the pines (5)
A river carves its own path (7)
Nature finds a way (5)

Example 2 (5-7-5):
The crow has flown off (5)
Swaying in the evening sun (7)
A leafless willow (5)

Now write a NEW haiku about ocean waves (3 short lines):
techniques: Simplified system prompt (fewer rules = better compliance)
Multi-attempt best-of-N selection (early exit on valid 5-7-5)
Post-processing: line trimming to target syllable counts
